membership_no.text: ทะเบียนผู้กู้

root.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date , 'DD MONTH YYYY') as requestment_date , sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no as loan_requestment_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_loan_request.begining_of_contract , 'DD MONTH YYYY') as begining_of_contract_thai , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_loan_request.begining_of_contract , 'DD-MM-YYYY') as begining_of_contract , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no ) as memname , substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date ),1,3) as age_live , pka_com_function.fp_form_idcard(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card)as id_card , sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no as membership_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_request_amount as loan_request_amount , pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai((sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_request_amount)::double precision) as loan_request_amount_thai , sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_description , pka_com_function.fp_get_numberthai((sc_lon_m_loan_request.period_payment_amount)::text) as period_payment_amount , pka_com_function.fp_get_numberthai((sc_lon_m_loan_request.last_payment_amount)::text) as last_payment_amount , pka_com_function.fp_get_numberthai((sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_installment_amount)::text) as loan_installment_amount , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.start_keep_date , 'MON YYYY')as start_keep_date , (sc_lon_m_int_step_rate.loan_interest_rate*100) as loan_interest_rate , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_position_long( sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no ) as position , sc_mem_m_member_address.address_no , sc_mem_m_member_address.moo , sc_mem_m_member_address.soi , sc_mem_m_member_address.road , sc_mem_m_member_address.tambol , pka_com_function.fp_get_district_name( sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code , sc_mem_m_member_address.district_code )as district , pka_com_function.fp_get_province_name( sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code )as province , sc_mem_m_member_address.telephone , si_security_user.user_name FROM sc_lon_m_loan_request, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_lon_m_rule, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj, sc_lon_m_int_step_rate, sc_mem_m_member_address, si_security_user WHERE sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no AND si_security_user.user_id = sc_lon_m_loan_request.entry_id AND sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no AND sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type AND sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_objective_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_code AND sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_type AND sc_lon_m_int_step_rate.loan_type = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type AND sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no AND sc_mem_m_member_address.address_type = '0' AND sc_lon_m_loan_request.cancel_status = '0' AND sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type = '25' /*WHERE*/ -- AND sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = '6520000373' ORDER BY sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ASC

r_tge_req_loan_norm_book_nest.sql: select sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ,(select sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_description from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_req_coll.seq_no = '1' )as collname1 ,(select sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_description from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_req_coll.seq_no = '2' )as collname2 ,(select sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_description from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_req_coll.seq_no = '3' )as collname3 ,(select sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_description from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_req_coll.seq_no = '4' )as collname4 ,(select sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_description from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code in ('02','03','04','05') )as collateral_description ,(select (case when sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code = '02' then 'หุ้นค้ำประกัน' when sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code = '03' then 'เงินฝากค้ำประกัน' when sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code = '04' then 'อสังหาริมทรัพย์' when sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code = '05' then 'ห้องชุด' end) from sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code in ('02','03','04','05') )as collateral_other from sc_lon_m_loan_request where 1=1 /*WHERE*/ AND sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = {0} --and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = '6520000373'
